interface.shortDescription: Personal Codex plugins and skills for review, scaffolding, UI testing, and agent workflows
interface.longDescription: AI Tools is Shravan Sunder's personal Codex marketplace for reusable agent workflows, including project scaffolding, native UI testing, manual multi-model counsel, and development workflows with research swarms, spec design swarms, spec handoffs, plan creation, discuss-with-me lifecycle alignment, docs maintenance, adversarial review lanes, operations security review routing, and TUI presentation guidance.
